---

## Overview

> A proprietary machine learning / ai system comprising 61 integrated source modules.

**SmartRoadGuardian** is an advanced machine learning / ai system engineered by **Karthik Idikuda**. 

<br/>

## System Architecture

```mermaid
graph TD;
    A["Raw Data Input"] -->|"Ingest"| B["Preprocessing Pipeline"];
    B -->|"Clean Tensors"| D{"Neural Net Engine"};
    D -->|"Training Loop"| E["Inference & Prediction"];
    E -->|"Metrics"| F["Evaluation & Output"];

    style A fill:#001030,stroke:#58a6ff,stroke-width:2px,color:#fff
    style B fill:#001845,stroke:#58a6ff,stroke-width:1px,color:#fff
    style D fill:#001030,stroke:#58a6ff,stroke-width:3px,color:#fff
    style E fill:#001845,stroke:#58a6ff,stroke-width:1px,color:#fff
    style F fill:#00205a,stroke:#58a6ff,stroke-width:2px,color:#fff
```

<br/>

## Project Structure

```
SmartRoadGuardian/
  .gitignore
  LICENSE
  README.md
  app/
    build.gradle.kts
    proguard-rules.pro
  gradle/
  scripts/
```

<br/>

## Technical Specifications

| Attribute | Detail |
|:---|:---|
| **Primary Language** | `Kotlin` |
| **Project Category** | `Machine Learning / AI` |
| **Total Source Files** | `61` |
| **Frameworks** | `Native` |
| **IP Status** | `Strictly Proprietary` |


## STRICT LEGAL WARNING

> **PROPRIETARY AND CONFIDENTIAL**

This software is the **exclusive property of Karthik Idikuda**.

- **NO PERMISSION** to use, copy, modify, or distribute without written consent.
- **UNAUTHORIZED USE** results in litigation, financial penalties, and criminal prosecution.
- **LICENSING:** Contact Karthik Idikuda directly to negotiate terms.

*By viewing this repository, you accept these proprietary terms.*
